query: How does the sign-on screen COSGN00C work?

results.name: SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN
results.preamble:
File: COSGN00C.cbl
Program: COSGN00C - CICS COBOL Program - Signon Screen for the CardDemo Application
Paragraph: SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN (lines 145-161)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COSGN00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
results.summary: paragraph SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN in COSGN00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COSGN00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN.

           PERFORM POPULATE-HEADER-INFO

           MOVE WS-MESSAGE TO ERRMSGO OF COSGN0AO

           EXEC CICS SEND
                     MAP('COSGN0A')
                     MAPSET('COSGN00')
                     FROM(COSGN0AO)
                     ERASE
                     CURSOR
           END-EXEC.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      SEND-PLAIN-TEXT
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.preamble:

results.summary: data_division DATA DIVISION in COSGN00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COSGN00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y....
results.content:
DATA DIVISION.
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                     WORKING STORAGE SECTION
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
       WORKING-STORAGE SECTION.

       01 WS-VARIABLES.
         05 WS-PGMNAME                 PIC X(08) VALUE 'COSGN00C'.
         05 WS-TRANID                  PIC X(04) VALUE 'CC00'.
         05 WS-MESSAGE                 PIC X(80) VALUE SPACES.
         05 WS-USRSEC-FILE             PIC X(08) VALUE 'USRSEC  '.
         05 WS-ERR-FLG                 PIC X(01) VALUE 'N'.
           88 ERR-FLG-ON                         VALUE 'Y'.
           88 ERR-FLG-OFF                        VALUE 'N'.
         05 WS-RESP-CD                 PIC S9(09) COMP VALUE ZEROS.
         05 WS-REAS-CD                 PIC S9(09) COMP VALUE ZEROS.
         05 WS-USER-ID                 PIC X(08).
         05 WS-USER-PWD                PIC X(08).

       COPY COCOM01Y.

       COPY COSGN00.

       COPY COTTL01Y.
       COPY CSDAT01Y.
       COPY CSMSG01Y.
       COPY CSUSR01Y.

       COPY DFHAID.
       COPY DFHBMSCA.
      *COPY DFHATTR.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                        LINKAGE SECTION
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
       LINKAGE SECTION.
       01  DFHCOMMAREA.
         05  LK-COMMAREA                           PIC X(01)
             OCCURS 1 TO 32767 TIMES DEPENDING ON EIBCALEN.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      PROCEDURE DIVISION
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
results.preamble:
File: COSGN00C.cbl
Program: COSGN00C - CICS COBOL Program - Signon Screen for the CardDemo Application
Paragraph: POPULATE-HEADER-INFO (lines 177-208)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COSGN00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
results.summary: paragraph POPULATE-HEADER-INFO in COSGN00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COSGN00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
POPULATE-HEADER-INFO.

           MOVE FUNCTION CURRENT-DATE  TO WS-CURDATE-DATA

           MOVE CCDA-TITLE01           TO TITLE01O OF COSGN0AO
           MOVE CCDA-TITLE02           TO TITLE02O OF COSGN0AO
           MOVE WS-TRANID              TO TRNNAMEO OF COSGN0AO
           MOVE WS-PGMNAME             TO PGMNAMEO OF COSGN0AO

           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MONTH       TO WS-CURDATE-MM
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-DAY         TO WS-CURDATE-DD
           MOVE WS-CURDATE-YEAR(3:2)   TO WS-CURDATE-YY

           MOVE WS-CURDATE-MM-DD-YY    TO CURDATEO OF COSGN0AO

           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HOURS       TO WS-CURTIME-HH
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-MINUTE      TO WS-CURTIME-MM
           MOVE WS-CURTIME-SECOND      TO WS-CURTIME-SS

           MOVE WS-CURTIME-HH-MM-SS    TO CURTIMEO OF COSGN0AO

           EXEC CICS ASSIGN
               APPLID(APPLIDO OF COSGN0AO)
           END-EXEC

           EXEC CICS ASSIGN
               SYSID(SYSIDO OF COSGN0AO)
           END-EXEC.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      READ-USER-SEC-FILE
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: MAIN-PARA
results.preamble:
File: COSGN00C.cbl
Program: COSGN00C - CICS COBOL Program - Signon Screen for the CardDemo Application
Paragraph: MAIN-PARA (lines 73-107)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COSGN00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY, PERFORM SEND-PLAIN-TEXT, PERFORM SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph MAIN-PARA in COSGN00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COSGN00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY, PERFORM SEND-PLAIN-TEXT, PERFORM SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN.
results.content:
MAIN-PARA.

           SET ERR-FLG-OFF TO TRUE

           MOVE SPACES TO WS-MESSAGE
                          ERRMSGO OF COSGN0AO

           IF EIBCALEN = 0
               MOVE LOW-VALUES TO COSGN0AO
               MOVE -1       TO USERIDL OF COSGN0AI
               PERFORM SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN
           ELSE
               EVALUATE EIBAID
                   WHEN DFHENTER
                       PERFORM PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
                   WHEN DFHPF3
                       MOVE CCDA-MSG-THANK-YOU        TO WS-MESSAGE
                       PERFORM SEND-PLAIN-TEXT
                   WHEN OTHER
                       MOVE 'Y'                       TO WS-ERR-FLG
                       MOVE CCDA-MSG-INVALID-KEY      TO WS-MESSAGE
                       PERFORM SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN
               END-EVALUATE
           END-IF.

           EXEC CICS RETURN
                     TRANSID (WS-TRANID)
                     COMMAREA (CARDDEMO-COMMAREA)
                     LENGTH(LENGTH OF CARDDEMO-COMMAREA)
           END-EXEC.


      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.content:
SEND-PLAIN-TEXT.

           EXEC CICS SEND TEXT
                     FROM(WS-MESSAGE)
                     LENGTH(LENGTH OF WS-MESSAGE)
                     ERASE
                     FREEKB
           END-EXEC.

           EXEC CICS RETURN
           END-EXEC.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      POPULATE-HEADER-INFO
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: PROCESS-ENTER-KEY
results.preamble:
File: COSGN00C.cbl
Program: COSGN00C - CICS COBOL Program - Signon Screen for the CardDemo Application
Paragraph: PROCESS-ENTER-KEY (lines 108-144)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COSGN00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE, PERFORM SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph PROCESS-ENTER-KEY in COSGN00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COSGN00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE, PERFORM SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
PROCESS-ENTER-KEY.

           EXEC CICS RECEIVE
                     MAP('COSGN0A')
                     MAPSET('COSGN00')
                     RESP(WS-RESP-CD)
                     RESP2(WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC.

           EVALUATE TRUE
               WHEN USERIDI OF COSGN0AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'      TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Please enter User ID ...' TO WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USERIDL OF COSGN0AI
                   PERFORM SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN
               WHEN PASSWDI OF COSGN0AI = SPACES OR LOW-VALUES
                   MOVE 'Y'      TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Please enter Password ...' TO WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO PASSWDL OF COSGN0AI
                   PERFORM SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   CONTINUE
           END-EVALUATE.

           MOVE FUNCTION UPPER-CASE(USERIDI OF COSGN0AI) TO
                           WS-USER-ID
                           CDEMO-USER-ID
           MOVE FUNCTION UPPER-CASE(PASSWDI OF COSGN0AI) TO
                           WS-USER-PWD

           IF NOT ERR-FLG-ON
               PERFORM READ-USER-SEC-FILE
           END-IF.

      *----------------------------------------------------------------*
      *                      SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN
      *----------------------------------------------------------------*

results.name: READ-USER-SEC-FILE
results.preamble:
File: COSGN00C.cbl
Program: COSGN00C - CICS COBOL Program - Signon Screen for the CardDemo Application
Paragraph: READ-USER-SEC-FILE (lines 209-260)
References: COPY COCOM01Y, COPY COSGN00, COPY COTTL01Y, COPY CSDAT01Y, COPY CSMSG01Y, COPY CSUSR01Y, COPY DFHAID, COPY DFHBMSCA
Calls: PERFORM SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN
results.summary: paragraph READ-USER-SEC-FILE in COSGN00C.cbl. uses COPY refs: COCOM01Y, COSGN00, COTTL01Y, CSDAT01Y.... invokes: PERFORM SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN. comment hint: ----------------------------------------------------------------*.
results.content:
READ-USER-SEC-FILE.

           EXEC CICS READ
                DATASET   (WS-USRSEC-FILE)
                INTO      (SEC-USER-DATA)
                LENGTH    (LENGTH OF SEC-USER-DATA)
                RIDFLD    (WS-USER-ID)
                KEYLENGTH (LENGTH OF WS-USER-ID)
                RESP      (WS-RESP-CD)
                RESP2     (WS-REAS-CD)
           END-EXEC.

           EVALUATE WS-RESP-CD
               WHEN 0
                   IF SEC-USR-PWD = WS-USER-PWD
                       MOVE WS-TRANID    TO CDEMO-FROM-TRANID
                       MOVE WS-PGMNAME   TO CDEMO-FROM-PROGRAM
                       MOVE WS-USER-ID   TO CDEMO-USER-ID
                       MOVE SEC-USR-TYPE TO CDEMO-USER-TYPE
                       MOVE ZEROS        TO CDEMO-PGM-CONTEXT

                       IF CDEMO-USRTYP-ADMIN
                            EXEC CICS XCTL
                              PROGRAM ('COADM01C')
                              COMMAREA(CARDDEMO-COMMAREA)
                            END-EXEC
                       ELSE
                            EXEC CICS XCTL
                              PROGRAM ('COMEN01C')
                              COMMAREA(CARDDEMO-COMMAREA)
                            END-EXEC
                       END-IF
                   ELSE
                       MOVE 'Wrong Password. Try again ...' TO
                                                          WS-MESSAGE
                       MOVE -1       TO PASSWDL OF COSGN0AI
                       PERFORM SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN
                   END-IF
               WHEN 13
                   MOVE 'Y'      TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'User not found. Try again ...' TO WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USERIDL OF COSGN0AI
                   PERFORM SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN
               WHEN OTHER
                   MOVE 'Y'      TO WS-ERR-FLG
                   MOVE 'Unable to verify the User ...' TO WS-MESSAGE
                   MOVE -1       TO USERIDL OF COSGN0AI
                   PERFORM SEND-SIGNON-SCREEN
           END-EVALUATE.
      *
      * Ver: CardDemo_v1.0-15-g27d6c6f-68 Date: 2022-07-19 23:12:33 CDT
      *

results.content:
COSGN00 DFHMSD CTRL=(ALARM,FREEKB),                                    -
               EXTATT=YES,                                             -
               LANG=COBOL,                                             -
               MODE=INOUT,                                             -
               STORAGE=AUTO,                                           -
               TIOAPFX=YES,                                            -
               TYPE=&&SYSPARM
